title: I am's pumkin tweak
description: This modpack remouves the HUD of the pumkin wen you ware it, now you can walk in the end without agressing any endermans !
body:
I am’s Pumpkin Tweak – Clear view, full immersion! 🎃

This lightweight tweak doesn’t change your pumpkins or world — it simply removes the HUD, giving you a clean, unobstructed view of your builds, landscapes, and adventures. Perfect for screenshots, cinematic worlds, or just enjoying Minecraft without distractions.

Features:

HUD completely removed

Fully compatible with any other texture pack

Vanilla Minecraft style intact

Experience Minecraft in a fresh, distraction-free way with I am’s Pumpkin Tweak.
